payload.rawSql:
INSERT INTO config.target_database (compartment, display_name, ip_address,
port, username, password,  minute_interval, days_retention,start_date_time, end_date_time,
start_time, end_time, created_by, last_updated_by, last_update_date)
VALUES
  ('${payload.compartment}','${payload.display_name}','${payload.ip_address}',
  ${payload.port},'${payload.username}',
    '${payload.password}',${payload.minute_interval},${payload.days_retention},
    STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.start_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
    STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.end_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
    '${payload.start_time}','${payload.end_time}','${__user.login}','${__user.login}',
    now()
    )
    ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
    ip_address = '${payload.ip_address}',
    port=${payload.port}, username='${payload.username}',
    password='${payload.password}',
    minute_interval=${payload.minute_interval},
    days_retention=${payload.days_retention}, 
    start_date_time=STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.start_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
    end_date_time=STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.end_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
    start_time='${payload.start_time}', end_time='${payload.end_time}',
    last_updated_by='${__user.login}', last_update_date=now()

targets.rawSql:
select CASE 
    -- 1. Check if TODAY falls between the start and end DATES
    WHEN (DATE(NOW()) BETWEEN DATE(start_date_time) AND DATE(end_date_time))
    -- 2. Check if the CURRENT CLOCK TIME falls between the start and end TIMES
    AND (CURTIME() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time) 
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS is_active,
compartment "Compartment", display_name "Instance", ip_address "IP Address", 
port "Port", username "Username", minute_interval "Interval (Min)", days_retention "Retention (Days)", start_date_time "Start Date", 
end_date_time "End Date", start_time "Schedule Start Time", end_time "Schedule End Time", created_by "Created By", creation_date "Date Creation",  
last_updated_by "Last Updated By", last_update_date "Last Update Date" from config.target_database

payload.rawSql:
INSERT INTO config.performance_schema_table (table_name, days_retention, 
start_date_time, end_date_time, created_by, creation_date, last_updated_by, last_update_date) 
VALUES ('${payload.table_name}', ${payload.days_retention},
STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.start_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.end_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
'${__user.login}', now(), '${__user.login}', now()
) 
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
days_retention=${payload.days_retention},
start_date_time=STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.start_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
end_date_time=STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.end_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
last_updated_by='${__user.login}', last_update_date=now()

targets.rawSql:
select CASE 
    -- 1. Check if TODAY falls between the start and end DATES
    WHEN (DATE(NOW()) BETWEEN DATE(start_date_time) AND DATE(end_date_time))
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS is_active, a.* from config.performance_schema_table a

INSERT INTO config.exclude_performance_schema (compartment, display_name, table_name, 
start_date_time, end_date_time, created_by, creation_date, last_updated_by, last_update_date) 
VALUES ('${payload.compartment}', '${payload.display_name}', 
'${payload.table_name}',
STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.start_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.end_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
'${__user.login}', now(), '${__user.login}', now()
) 
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
start_date_time=STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.start_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
end_date_time=STR_TO_DATE(LEFT('${payload.end_date_time}', 19), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s'),
last_updated_by='${__user.login}', last_update_date=now()

targets.rawSql:
select CASE 
    -- 1. Check if TODAY falls between the start and end DATES
    WHEN (DATE(NOW()) BETWEEN DATE(start_date_time) AND DATE(end_date_time))
    THEN 1 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS is_active, a.* from config.exclude_performance_schema a

SELECT (1 - (SUM(IF(VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads', VARIABLE_VALUE, 0)) / 
SUM(IF(VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests', VARIABLE_VALUE, 1)))) * 100 AS hit_ratio 
FROM performance_schema.global_status 
WHERE VARIABLE_NAME IN ('Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests', 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads');

SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 AS size_gb
FROM performance_schema.global_variables 
WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'innodb_buffer_pool_size'

SELECT
            sum(ROUND(DATA_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Data Size (MB)`,
                sum(ROUND(INDEX_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Index Size (MB)`,
                    sum(ROUND((DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Total Size (MB)`
                    FROM
                        information_schema.TABLES
                        WHERE
                            TABLE_SCHEMA like '%#%' -- Replace with your database name

SELECT
    TABLE_SCHEMA AS `Database Target`,
    sum(TABLE_ROWS) AS `Approx Rows`,
    sum(ROUND(DATA_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Data Size (MB)`,
    sum(ROUND(INDEX_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Index Size (MB)`,
    sum(ROUND((DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Total Size (MB)`
FROM
    information_schema.TABLES
WHERE
    TABLE_SCHEMA like '%#%' -- Replace with your database name
GROUP BY TABLE_SCHEMA
ORDER BY
    (sum(ROUND(DATA_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) + sum(ROUND(INDEX_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2))) DESC

SELECT
    TABLE_NAME AS `Table`,
    sum(TABLE_ROWS) AS `Approx Rows`,
    sum(ROUND(DATA_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Data Size (MB)`,
    sum(ROUND(INDEX_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Index Size (MB)`,
    sum(ROUND((DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024, 2)) AS `Total Size (MB)`
FROM
    information_schema.TABLES
WHERE
    TABLE_SCHEMA like '%#%' -- Replace with your database name
GROUP BY TABLE_NAME
ORDER BY
    (sum(ROUND(DATA_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2)) + sum(ROUND(INDEX_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2))) DESC

SELECT 
    DIGEST_TEXT,
    COUNT_STAR AS execution_count,
    FORMAT_PICO_TIME(SUM_TIMER_WAIT) AS total_latency,
    FORMAT_PICO_TIME(AVG_TIMER_WAIT) AS avg_latency,
    FORMAT_PICO_TIME(MAX_TIMER_WAIT) AS max_latency,
    SUM_ROWS_EXAMINED AS total_rows_scanned
FROM performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest
ORDER BY SUM_TIMER_WAIT DESC
LIMIT 20;
